## Plugins (77)

## FAI Protocol
- fai-manifest.json: Context-wiring for 9 primitive types
- fai-context.json: LEGO block auto-wiring
- FAI Engine: 7 modules, 12ms load
- Validation: 2800+ checks

# Install: npx frootai-mcp@latest
# Website: https://frootai.dev
# GitHub: https://github.com/frootai/frootai
